mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permission (document_id, user_id, permission_type) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{userId}, #{permissionType})
mapper.select: SELECT user.* FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM permission WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND permission_type IN ('editor', 'viewer') ) AS perm INNER JOIN user ON perm.user_id = user.id
